overall.description: First-person exploration through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The player walks past holographic billboards, neon-lit street vendors, and under massive overpasses while light traffic moves through the foggy streets. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077 style) with cinematic neon lighting and reflective wet surfaces.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway, observing the large holographic billboards on the left wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward camera along the wall

entered.detail: large curved wall covered with animated holographic advertisements and neon signage
rain-soaked ground reflecting the neon lights and holographic displays
line of palm trees in planters along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered pedestrian walkway at night, with heavy rain creating reflective puddles on the pavement. Large holographic billboards cover the left wall, displaying animated advertisements in vibrant neon colors. Palm trees line the right side, and a few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with street vendor and vertical advertising

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with visible sky between buildings
passes street food vendor cart with bright neon lighting and steam

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, approaching and passing a street food vendor on the right

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at illuminated food cart serving customers

entered.detail: tall vertical advertising banner displaying a portrait with text 'Every Night'
small food vendor cart with orange neon lighting and umbrella
yellow kiosk structure with multiple digital advertisement screens
small structure with red neon trim and green illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a rain-soaked plaza with a prominent vertical holographic banner visible between skyscrapers. The camera passes a street food vendor with glowing neon lights on the right, while a yellow advertising booth stands on the left. The environment transitions from enclosed to exposed, with rain visibly falling.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with closed shop fronts

events.description: turns corner into narrower street with closed metal shutters and shop signs
passes under bright pink and blue neon circular sign

agents.ego_description: turning right into a narrower street, continuing past closed shops and neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near shop entrance looking at phone

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with Japanese characters and pink/blue lighting
metal roll-down shutters covering storefronts with graffiti
stand with multiple magazine covers displayed

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a narrower commercial street lined with closed shops and metal shutters. A prominent circular neon sign glows on the right, while the street leads toward a large overpass structure in the distance. The rain continues to fall on the reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: under pedestrian overpass leading to street crossing

events.description: passes under large concrete pedestrian overpass structure
crosses street with moving vehicle traffic passing through intersection

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and crossing the street while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the wet intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: large concrete overpass with stairs and illuminated walkway above
cars and trucks moving through the intersection on wet asphalt
metal safety railing along the sidewalk edge
massive billboard displaying animated content above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a massive concrete pedestrian overpass, transitioning from the narrow street to a wider intersection. Vehicles drive through the rain-soaked streets with headlights reflecting off the wet asphalt. The scene opens up to show large digital billboards and the urban traffic environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian overpass stairs and upper walkway

events.description: begins ascending stairs to upper pedestrian walkway level

agents.ego_description: walking up the stairs to the pedestrian overpass while other pedestrians descend

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking down the stairs toward camera

entered.detail: concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to overpass
covered pedestrian bridge with glass panels and concrete supports

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching and ascending the stairs to a pedestrian overpass. The yellow advertising booth remains visible in the background as the perspective shifts upward. Other pedestrians are seen walking down the stairs, and the covered overhead walkway structure dominates the upper portion of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pedestrian walkway into an open, rain-drenched urban plaza and finally down a narrow commercial street. It begins under a covered path where vibrant holographic billboards line the walls and reflective puddles mirror the neon glow beside a row of palm trees. As the camera moves forward, the environment opens into an exposed plaza where rain falls freely around a towering vertical holographic banner and a glowing street food vendor. The scene then shifts as the camera turns into a tighter corridor of closed shops with metal shutters, passing a prominent circular neon sign. Finally, the path leads deeper into the city, moving along the wet pavement toward a massive overpass structure looming in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a rain-slicked urban intersection up toward a towering pedestrian overpass. It begins by gliding under a massive concrete overpass, moving from a narrow street into a wide intersection where vehicle headlights shimmer across the wet asphalt. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal towering digital billboards and the dense flow of city traffic. The scene then shifts toward a yellow advertising booth before the perspective turns upward, ascending a set of stairs. Finally, the camera climbs past descending pedestrians until the heavy structure of the covered overhead walkway dominates the frame.
